title: Nursery Rhyme. CLXXXI. Songs.
content:
I'll sing you a song,
        Though not very long,
            Yet I think it as pretty as any,
        Put your hand in your purse,
        You'll never be worse,
            And give the poor singer a penny.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CLXXXI. Songs."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
